description: Refactor the multi-issue complaint titled 'Neighbor Nuisance Report - [Date]' into two separate cases. Update the original case by changing the title to 'Noise Violation - 42 Oak St' and modifying the description to include only the noise and drum allegations. Create a new complaint case titled 'Sanitation Hazard - 42 Oak St' with the description 'Large pile of rotting trash in driveway attracting rats.' Link these two cases using the 'Related' relationship type and add a note to the original noise case stating: 'Sanitation issue split to new case [New Case Number]'.
